title: Rotom-Tale
description: A worldgen datapack that adds rooms to vanilla structures telling a story on Rotom
body:
# **A story of an adventurer and its Rotom**
- This worldgen datapack, designed for the Cobblemon mod, Tells a short story about an adventurer and its Rotom, through changing vanilla minecraft structures!
- The pack also introduces **5 custom advancements!** all centered around Rotom and his forms!
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **Required mods and datapacks**
## - **The following are a must have to ensure the best expiriance while plying**
1. The [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod
2. [Copper Appliances](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-appliances) mod
3. [Rotom-Push](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-push) datapack
4. [Rotom Appliances](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rotom-appliances) datapack
______________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **How to install**
1. Download the datapack for your version.
2. Add the file to your datapack under saves/[worldname]/datapacks
3. Select the world and play!
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________
# **A room within the chambers**
- In the trial chambers, right outside the entrance, you may see portriat of diffrent mobs. With this datapack installed, you may see a new famillier one...
![Rotom_room_outside_tc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f08d9938c907949e6556ec6058c81c977c664a47.png)
- All 5 of Rotoms appliances can be found here
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Inside_rotom_room_tc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f0d3dd23a426559cac7ae6a49b60d69c81dbd43.png)
- So what is that sculk vein?
</details>
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________________________


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# **A room within the ancient city**
- Deep inside the redstone room, lies a secret room with A special block.
- Could you track it down?

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

# **Appliances in the mansion?!**
- For some reason, some Illigers had gotten their hands on some of the appliances
- They seem to have forgotten all about it, as they are encased in an old storage room on the top floor

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Inside_rotom_room_wm](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/422eb8ed559bed5c9f873c5b13090f577681d43e.png)
